reason: Anesthesia Technicians support 24/7 surgical operations through 8, 10, or 12-hour shifts that encompass evenings, nights, and weekends. Prime daytime shifts are typically awarded based on seniority, leaving new hires to regularly cover off-hours. Furthermore, there is a high on-call requirement for off-hour emergencies, and standard shifts frequently extend late due to unpredictable surgical times.
